title: linaria genistifolia subsp. sofiana
intro: Linaria genistifolia subsp. sofiana, also known as the Toadflax or Butterfly Flower, is a rare and unique plant species belonging to the figwort family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as soothing respiratory issues, relieving anxiety and stress, and promoting digestion. Herbal preparations of Linaria genistifolia subsp. sofiana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
